creator: mhorne@freebsd.org
text:
Hi, thanks for your interest in this hardware and your report. However, I am closing this, because FreeBSD does not yet run on this hardware, even in 15.0-CURRENT. Thus the behavior you are seeing is expected.

The existence of the (new) u-boot port for this board is not an announcement of support, but a single step along the way there. There are efforts in-progress, but it will take time before FreeBSD is functional on this hardware.

I created a new wiki page tracking VisionFive v2 support status; I suggest you monitor that page for updates.

https://wiki.freebsd.org/riscv/StarFive

Cheers,
Mitchell
